title: Gap-log entry
description: A trading day (or method scope within it) that failed to submit and was logged as a gap. Gaps are never backfilled; they are documented facts.

date.description: The trading day whose submission was missed.

scope.description: What was missed: all methods, or a subset (e.g. 'agents', 'all_methods', a predictor_id).

retries_attempted.description: Number of bounded same-evening retries attempted before giving up.
